stories.headline: Israel approves plan to establish 13 new settlements in occupied West Bank
stories.description: Palestinian officials warn against the implications of the plan, saying it would further isolate East Jerusalem.

stories.headline: India: Instagram running ads promoting child sexual abuse material, BBC finds
stories.description: The ads use terms including “rape” and “child video” and link to content on the messaging app Telegram.

stories.headline: Four killed in Ukraine a day after deadliest Russian attacks this year
stories.description: At least two people were separately killed in Ukrainian attacks on Russia’s border regions.

stories.headline: FIFA World Cup 2026: Round of 16 bracket, Friday schedule, predictions
stories.description: Three final Round of 16 spots up for grabs as Argentina, Australia, Cape Verde, Colombia, Egypt, Ghana are in action.

stories.headline: After 250 years the American Dream is surviving, but only just
stories.description: The American Dream has persisted since the days of the Founding Fathers, but faith in the ideal is fading
